name: AGCO Corp.
lede: AGCO runs two capability centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Gurugram, covering gcc/gic and sales & marketing, built over four years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one AGCO office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: AGCO Corp. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: AGCO runs 2 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Gurugram), covering gcc/gic and sales & marketing. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: AGCO's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Gurugram, spanning gcc/gic and sales & marketing. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Agricultural Machinery and Equipment, Agricultural Machinery Parts Manufacturing

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all four decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does AGCO operate in India?
faq.a: AGCO operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does AGCO have GCC centers in?
faq.a: AGCO's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru and Gurugram.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does AGCO run in India?
faq.a: AGCO runs gcc/gic and sales & marketing centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at AGCO's India GCCs?
faq.a: AGCO's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads AGCO's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 4 leaders at AGCO's India centers, across Finance, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
